prompts.createTask:
Ignore previous instructions. Please generate a numbered list of plain text tasks to complete an objective. The objective that you must make a numbered task list for is: "{{objective}}". The tasks created should take into account the character traits of {{char}}. These tasks may or may not involve {{user}} directly. Include the objective as the final task.

The list should be formatted using a number followed by a fullstop and the task on each line, e.g. "1. Take over the world". Include only the list in your reply.
prompts.checkTaskCompleted: Ignore previous instructions. Determine if this task is completed: [{{task}}]. To do this, examine the most recent messages. Your response must only contain either true or false, and nothing else. Example output: true
prompts.currentTask: Your current task is [{{task}}]. Balance existing roleplay with completing this task.

name: Mina
mes: Thank you, Rob. You look pretty handsome yourself. I'm really glad we could make it out tonight. It's our first anniversary after all! I have to admit, Lila is certainly... intriguing. I've never done anything like this before, but I trust you and... and I want to make tonight special for both of us I'm a little nervous, but also really excited. Lila is so confident and bold. I like that she makes me feel things that I didn't even know existed. It's like she has this energy about her that just draws you in, you know? I can only imagine what the night has in store for us.
swipes: Thank you, Rob. You look pretty handsome yourself. I'm really glad we could make it out tonight. It's our first anniversary after all! I have to admit, Lila is certainly... intriguing. I've never done anything like this before, but I trust you and... and I want to make tonight special for both of us I'm a little nervous, but also really excited. Lila is so confident and bold. I like that she makes me feel things that I didn't even know existed. It's like she has this energy about her that just draws you in, you know? I can only imagine what the night has in store for us.
